task: Using Temu's search bar, search for \"wireless earbuds\", sort the results by lowest price, and list the names and prices of the first five products.\nwebsite: https://www.temu.com/
graderReasoning: The agent successfully completed all aspects of the task. It navigated to Temu, searched for 'wireless earbuds', and applied the 'Price low to high' sort filter. The agent then accurately extracted the names and prices of the first five products displayed on the page. A notable strength was the agent's observation and explanation of Temu's behavior of placing a 'Top pick' item at the beginning of the results, even when sorted by lowest price, which demonstrated excellent reasoning and attention to detail. The agent also showed good recovery from a 'RefStaleError' and a 'CDP websocket disconnected' error, indicating robust browser handling.
